thought.text: 我会先构建 task2 检查编译错误。

task_list.title: Inspect task2 parser framework and configuration
task_list.notes: ANTLR selected with revive ON; custom lexer reads task1 token stream. Current grammar supports only minimal int/add/return.

task_list.title: Run baseline task2 score
task_list.notes: Baseline score 20.55/100; many crashes due to missing tokens/operators/control flow.

task_list.title: Implement parser/AST coverage for missing cases
task_list.notes: Expanded token map, grammar, expression/statement/function parameter conversions, and null guards in typing.

task_list.title: Verify task2 score and iterate
task_list.notes: Build, fix compilation/runtime issues, then run task2-score.

tool_call.name: task_tracker

Current grammar supports only minimal int/add/return."}, {"title": "Run baseline task2 score", "status": "done", "notes": "Baseline score 20.55/100; many crashes due to missing tokens/operators/control flow."}, {"title": "Implement parser/AST coverage for missing cases", "status": "in_progress", "notes": "Expanded token map, grammar, expression/statement/function parameter conversions, and null guards in typing."}, {"title": "Verify task2 score and iterate", "status": "todo", "notes": "Build, fix compilation/runtime issues, then run task2-score."}], "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Update task2 implementation progress"}
